subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: Being thoroughly surrounded by the enemies, in the course of the Battle of the Moat, known as Harbu'l-Ahrab, His Holiness Muhammad and His companions were so starved
subcodes.first_line_orig: در حرب خندق یا معروف بحرب الاحزاب حضرت محمد و اصحاب از شدت گرسنگی سنگ بشکم بسته
subcodes.subjects: @episodes from the early history of Islam, @prophecy and fulfillment
